allow: PowerShell($msbuild = Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio' -Recurse -Filter MSBuild.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($msbuild\) { $msbuild.FullName } else { 'NOT FOUND' })

PowerShell($paths = @\('C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022','C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft Visual Studio'\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Get-ChildItem $p -Recurse -Filter MSBuild.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 -ExpandProperty FullName } })

PowerShell($msbuild = Get-ChildItem "D:\\visual studio\\MSBuild\\Current\\Bin\\MSBuild.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName; cd "e:\\opengl\\iMc"; & $msbuild iMc.vcxproj /p:Configuration=Debug /p:Platform=x64 /t:Build /m /v:minimal 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30)

PowerShell($files = @\("scr/net/NetCommon.h", "scr/net/NetMessage.h", "scr/net/NetMessage.cpp", "scr/net/NetManager.h", "scr/net/NetManager.cpp", "scr/net/NetChunkSync.h", "scr/net/NetChunkSync.cpp", "scr/World.cpp", "scr/render/RenderSystem.cpp"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $full = "e:\\opengl\\iMc\\$f"; if \(Test-Path $full\) { $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($full\); $bom = if \($bytes.Length -ge 3 -and $bytes[0] -eq 0xEF -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xBB -and $bytes[2] -eq 0xBF\) { "UTF-8-BOM" } else { "NO-BOM" }; Write-Output "$f : $bom" } })

PowerShell(Get-Process msbuild -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $bytes = Get-Content "e:\\opengl\\iMc\\scr\\chunk\\ChunkManager.h" -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $utf8bom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($true\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\("e:\\opengl\\iMc\\scr\\chunk\\ChunkManager.h", $bytes, $utf8bom\); $check = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("e:\\opengl\\iMc\\scr\\chunk\\ChunkManager.h"\); Write-Output "ChunkManager.h: $\($check[0].ToString\('X2'\)\) $\($check[1].ToString\('X2'\)\) $\($check[2].ToString\('X2'\)\)")

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "e:\\opengl\\iMc\\scr\\chunk\\ChunkManager.h" -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $utf8bom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($true\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\("e:\\opengl\\iMc\\scr\\chunk\\ChunkManager_bom.h", $content, $utf8bom\); Get-Content "e:\\opengl\\iMc\\scr\\chunk\\ChunkManager_bom.h" -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | Out-Null; Write-Output "Temp file written")

PowerShell($msbuild = "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022\\Community\\MSBuild\\Current\\Bin\\MSBuild.exe"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $msbuild\)\) { $msbuild = "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022\\Professional\\MSBuild\\Current\\Bin\\MSBuild.exe" }; if \(-not \(Test-Path $msbuild\)\) { $msbuild = "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\2022\\Enterprise\\MSBuild\\Current\\Bin\\MSBuild.exe" }; & $msbuild "e:\\opengl\\iMc\\iMc.vcxproj" /p:Configuration=Debug /p:Platform=x64 /t:Build /m /verbosity:minimal 2>&1)
